transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling HarborWell Care Line, this is Ava. What's going on today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I've had a pounding headache since yesterday and some blurry vision on and off.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Can I get your member ID to pull up your record?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's B as in bravo, 4-4-8-2-1-9.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, pulling up member D-4-4-8-2-1-9 now. Any nausea, weakness on one side, or trouble speaking?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No weakness, but I did throw up once this morning.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. Have you had headaches like this before, or is this new?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: New, and it's way worse than my usual tension headaches.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Given the sudden severe headache with vomiting and vision changes, I'd like you to go to urgent care or the ER today rather than wait for a callback.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that's what I was afraid of. Should I mention anything specific?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, tell them about the vision changes and vomiting, and mention your member ID D-4-4-8-2-1-9 so they can check your history.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Alright, I'll head there now. Thank you.
